events.name: 移動（一階廊下　生徒A-B）
移動（一階廊下　生徒A-B）

parameters: Ah, good work. Captain. It seems you've come to the club again today.
Well, yeah. I had some business today, so...
Ah, I wonder if she's here.
I've been waiting for you, Ayame-chan.
Thank you for taking the time to listen to my sudden request today！
It's fine！ I was just thinking of dropping by the club too, so！
(Let's try using the information gathered here...)
By the way, Ayame-chan, I didn't know you're actually into
programming or robotics or something like that？
Huh？ How did you... know that？
You seemed interested in the computer club today, so... I thought maybe you liked it.
L-love robots and programs and stuff even though I'm a girl…！！
B-but…！ W-well…I'm bad at using computers…
I like robots too…but I can't make them or anything…
I just look at them and play with them…！
But I think it'd be nice if I could try doing it myself, so I read books about that sort of thing…
B-but I don't understand it at all, I mean…
Hehe…I'm glad I could make you happy.
(I don't know anything about you, Ayame-chan…)
No…I think I'm in the way, so
I'll do the rest of my work at home.
Ah, sorry about that…Did I make you feel like you had to be considerate？
No... I'll pretend I didn't see anything...
O-oh, okay... Alright, see you tomorrow.
Alright, let's try messing around with the computer.
Yes！ I know how to log in！
Before we start with programming, let's study the basics of computers！
I wonder how much Ayame-chan knows about using computers？
Um... I can do things like send emails with someone...
Emails, huh... So you're more used to computers than I thought...
Ah, but... when I send an email, for some reason, the next day I get all sorts of emails,
...(I think that's a bit of a problem...)
Alright, let's start by studying email...
And then we'll gradually move on to studying programming...
Y-yes...! Thank you for your guidance, Senpai \N[0001]!
Ugh... computers are still difficult, it seems...
I'm having a hard time just inputting text...
Well... I've not even touched the tip of programming yet...
I'm finally at the level of an average person, right? I'm sure.
Yeah... B-but！ If you talk to me again, I'll teach you anytime！
It's reassuring to have onii-san teach me！
Well... he's not really good at this sort of thing either...
It's kind of enviable to have a reliable onii-san like that！
Really？ I'm being treated coldly by him, though...
Do you, Ayame-chan, not have any siblings？
Yes...！ I'm an only child, so...
Is that so... Ah, I just remembered, aren't you thirsty？
I had prepared drinks, but I completely forgot to give them to you.
Is it okay？ Actually, I'm a bit thirsty！
G-gosh, I'm sorry！！ My uniform…what should I do…I stained it, didn't I…！！
I-I'll borrow a change of clothes from my teacher, so…！
N-no, if my clothes are okay with you, you can wear them…
Going to the teacher's place in this state must be tough, right？
B-but if I wear your clothes, Senpai…
I think there are some forgotten shirts or something in this club room.
Y-yeah！ Don't worry about it！ It's my fault too, you know…
…a-ah, thank you very much…I'll take you up on your offer…
I-I'm going to change, so…could you look away？
O-oh... (He's shirt is all wet and... cute...)
S-sorry... I'm so sorry for the mess...
(Rather, I want to see more, but I can't say it...)
A-anyway, you're still wet... because of the drink...
S-so, I'll wipe it for you.
A-ah, s-sorry...！ It looks like it's flowing between my breasts too...
S-sorry... I-I'm sorry for touching such a place...
I'm okay... just... touch a bit more...
Haa... haa... (Oh no... I'm already getting an erection...)
Wah...！ S-sorry！ The buttons on my shirt...
I'll wipe this area thoroughly too... Ayame-chan...！
I-I'm fine...！ I won't do anything weird, okay...? See...
It's nice when you wipe it properly, isn't it？
Hyan... D-do you think it's wet to that extent...？
Y-yes, it is... see... the tip of this... still needs to be wiped...
I'm feeling it with my nipples…Ayame-chan…so cute…)
(She hasn't said anything yet…maybe just a little more…)
… (You've been so quiet since a while ago…Ayame-chan…
… (And that restrained face is cute too…)
Y-You're being weird since a while ago…！
Wha, was it weird…？ I was just wiping it…
S-Somehow… t-the way you're touching me is gradually…
(I wonder if Ayame-chan has started to notice that something's off…)
B-but… if I don't touch it with my hand, you see…
I-I'm sorry if you didn't like it…！ Sorry…！ I'll stop now…
If I just wipe it a little with my finger here…\N[0003]I'll call someone, okay…
I-I think it's better to have your boyfriend come pick you up in times like these…
A-Alright…！ I'll send him a message, so he'll be here soon！
Nhaaa, y-yes… I'm sorry for everything…
So... why are you with Ayame, Onii-chan！
B-but...！ In front of people other than me, this kind of getup...
I'm the one who did something wrong, so...
Don't be too hard on Ayame-chan, okay?
When I was teaching you how to use the computer, I spilled a drink...
And you got your uniform dirty, right？
Y-yes... Ah, I'll pay for the cleaning, so... here you go...
You'd be better off not having anything to do with my Onii-chan anymore.
B-but... I enjoyed learning about computers, though...？
A-anyway, if anything else happens, I'll get angry, got it！
That's right...Today we did that thing with Maho-senpai, right...
I wonder if I should send Maho-senpai an email♪
（I should go to the second-floor hallway...）
Oh, wait, what's going on？ Are there only two staff members here today？
That's right, that's right！ There's me and Adachi over there.
That's right！ Adachi is always alone, so I'm not very good with him,
so I'm doing the programming by myself...
No, that's not good (sweat). You should consult with Adachi properly...！
But, even if you talk to him, he just says 'huh' or 'yes'...
It's hard to work with him, that's what I mean.
Shibata, you're the friendly type, so you should be the one to go to him...
A-Adachi... how's the program on your end？ ...Going smoothly？
No problems, you say！ Department head！
Sigh... honestly... this year's program contest,
we're aiming for the championship, aren't we？ But none of the members come to practice,
and you guys are like that too.
Ah！ Don't worry about it！ The guys who aren't here today,
are just out buying PC parts！
You were told that the other day, weren't you？
If things stay as they are, the PC specs are just too low,
so even if we write the program, it'll be too slow and we won't make any progress！
That's right！ So, you're saying to go shopping during your free time,
You were counting on us, weren't you, Department Chief～
That's right, that's right. So, let's leave the rest of the shopping to the remaining members,
and we'll work on writing the rest of the program code.
We can't check it yet, so let's just create the code for today.
Got it！ Adachi, were you listening too？
Alright, let's work together again today～
What's wrong, are you already tired？
That's right～ Lately, I've been busy～！
No～ Are you going to ask about that？
Even if you don't want to say, it's fine.
A girlfriend！？ (Lately, I've been hearing rumors that you've got a girlfriend...)
\N[0001]I was thinking I'd like to introduce you to my senpai～
Why are you introducing me to your senpai...
Well～, I'm grateful to her in the club activities... It's like a greeting to my parents？
Well, well! I'm planning to go have dinner with my girlfriend after today's club activities, and
Why don't you join us, senpai, if you're free？
I'm not saying I'm not interested in your girlfriend...
So, it's settled！ After the club activities,
Let's go to the family restaurant！
Alright, let's give it our all for the rest of the time.
I haven't seen Ayame-chan at school lately...
I wonder if I should send her an email.
I think I'll head to the student council room now.
I think I'll head to the student council room now.
There's still time before the meeting with Shibata, so
I'll go to the student council room to meet her now...！
Oh, wait, what's going on？ Are there only two staff members here today？
That's right, that's right！ There's me and Adachi over there.
That's right！ Adachi is always alone, so I'm not very good with him,
so I'm doing the programming by myself...
No, that's not good (sweat). You should consult with Adachi properly...！
But, even if you talk to him, he just says 'huh' or 'yes'...
It's hard to work with him, that's what I mean.
Shibata, you're the friendly type, so you should be the one to go to him...

so even if we write the program, it'll be too slow and we won't make any progress！
That's right！ So, you're saying to go shopping during your free time,
You were counting on us, weren't you, Department Chief～
That's right, that's right. So, let's leave the rest of the shopping to the remaining members,
and we'll work on writing the rest of the program code.
We can't check it yet, so let's just create the code for today.

Alright, let's work together again today～

That's right～ Lately, I've been busy～！
No～ Are you going to ask about that？
Even if you don't want to say, it's fine.
A girlfriend！？ (Lately, I've been hearing rumors that you've got a girlfriend...)

Well～, I'm grateful to her in the club activities... It's like a greeting to my parents？
Well, well! I'm planning to go have dinner with my girlfriend after today's club activities, and
Why don't you join us, senpai, if you're free？
I'm not saying I'm not interested in your girlfriend...
So, it's settled！ After the club activities,
Let's go to the family restaurant！
Alright, let's give it our all for the rest of the time.
I want to go see it now！
Good luck with the Kyudo club's practice.
I want to go see it now！
Good luck with the Kyudo club's practice.
There's still time before the meeting with Shibata, so
Shibata-san hasn't come to club activities lately...
The other club members are out shopping again.
Huh？ Is there still shopping to do？
Yes. They said they want to make something.
They said it's for buying things to convince the captain.
So, I'll do the program startup check today,
Adachi, if you have any concerns, feel free to ask me.
Sigh... this place... and this is...
Good work. I'm from the student council.
President, the student council members are here.
Got it, I'll head over there. Thanks, Adachi.
Sigh... as I thought, it's my big brother...
Ah, ah... the one from the student council is my little brother.
R-really...！ That's why the surname is...
Ah, um... when you signed the budget documents, your surname...
W-well, that's the thing... so why are you here at our department again today？
The budget document you submitted had some missing entries...
That's right, you're always so careless in these matters, onii-san...
You're an onii-san, so...you can't say things like that...
It's okay, Ayame...I'm your onii-san, after all...
\N[0003]...kun？ Ayame？ You're quite close, aren't you...)
Ahem！ S-so, where were the missing entries again？
Ah, yes！ The check items on this side...
Yes！ I think this should be fine now！
Yes！ Thank you for your time and cooperation！
Yeah. So? What's your relationship with \N[0003] Ayame-chan?
Huh, so you two are in that kind of relationship?
And, by the way... don't be so casual when calling Ayame's name...
You're the one calling her that casually, aren't you？
I-I'm fine... (I'm her boyfriend, after all...)
I see... you've got such a cute girlfriend as your little brother...
Onii-chan's in shock... You didn't even tell me...
A-anyway... I don't want to be treated like Onii-chan's little sister anymore...
My little brother can be stiff sometimes, but please get along with him, okay?
Of course！ \N[0003] is a kind and honest person！
I'm glad to hear that Onii-san is also kind.
Yeah, Onii-san is kind, so！ So, um, this,
is my contact info... I want you to have it as your Onii-chan...
If you're ever in trouble with something related to you, you'll need your Onii-chan, right？
Ayame... you don't have to accept that...
Having Onii-san around makes me feel secure！
Guh... don't do anything weird to my girlfriend, okay?
That's a given, right？ So, it's about time we wrap up this conversation...
A-ah, y-yes, it seems so！ I'm sorry for taking up so much of your time during your club activities...！
It's alright, so if anything else comes up, just contact me again, okay?
Sigh... it's Ayame-chan... As I thought, she's cute...
...Captain. Laying hands on her is forbidden...

I got a message on my phone.
Take care of my little brother.
